confidenceReason: Break-glass logs were inspected for the latest quarter.

criteriaResults.rationale: The evidence leaves a visible gap below target.
The evidence is still sufficient to rely on with follow-up.

ratingDrivers.description: Every break-glass use in the latest quarter has an approver and incident link, but one post-use access review was recorded late.

rationale: The review path exists and is mostly followed, but the late review keeps operations security below target.
